title: Operations & Maintenance Report
autoGenerated: Auto-generated from Customer Care Portal data
siteOverviewSub: List of minigrids and PIH clinics with districts
customerGrowthSub: Quarterly new connections and cumulative total since first site commissioned
cumulativeConsumedSub: Running total since first site was commissioned
cumulativeSalesSub: Running total revenue since first site was commissioned
avgDailyConsumptionSub: Trend in average daily kWh consumption per customer over time
dailyLoadCurves: Average Daily Load Curves by Customer Type
noMeterData: No meter reading data available for the selected site.
avgDailyConsumptionByType: Average Daily Consumption by Customer Type
totalConsumptionByTypeSub: Electricity consumed (kWh) and revenue (LSL) by end-user category
quarterlyByTypeSub: Stacked breakdown of electricity consumed per quarter by end-user category
typeAnalyticsNA: Customer type analytics not yet available.
typeAnalyticsNASub: The meter records currently available to the CC system may not contain customer type data for all meters. Check the Tables view to verify meter records exist.
dataSource: Data source: 1PWR Customer Care Portal (1PDB-backed) + uGridPLAN connection metadata
genDataNote: Generation data, site availability, and maintenance logs require integration with the Generation Data Platform and O&M ticketing system.
